note: Recorded tool surface of the external WordPress/mcp-adapter default MCP server, captured from a live WordPress running mcp-adapter 0.4.1 + its abilities-api 0.4.0 dependency (the versions the connector dev fixture provisions). Regenerate with scripts/probe-mcp-adapter.mjs against a site with an Application Password; this file is the exact probe output plus this note. It records WHY the connector injects the adapter with allowedTools:null + requireApproval:read-only and why external page workflows use the Cinatra primitives (postType:"page"): the adapter exposes only a generic ability gateway, no first-class page/post tools.
